title: UI Anti-Patterns
description: Common mistakes in enterprise applications and how to avoid them

antiPatterns.title: burying Important Actions
antiPatterns.problem: Primary actions hidden in menus or below the fold
antiPatterns.impact: Users miss critical functions, increased support tickets
solutions: Place primary actions in prominent positions (top-right, above fold)
Use buttons, not icons alone for important actions
If action must be in menu, consider if it should be surfaced instead

antiPatterns.title: Unlabeled Icon Buttons
antiPatterns.problem: Icons without text labels or tooltips
solutions: Add text labels to icon buttons when space allows
Ensure tooltips appear on hover with clear labels
Use recognizable iconography from the icon library
When in doubt, prefer text over icons for actions

antiPatterns.title: Deep Navigation Hierarchies
antiPatterns.problem: Users need 4+ clicks to reach common content
solutions: Flatten navigation where possible
Use dashboard as launchpad for recent items
Implement search for quick access
Consider recently viewed/saved items shortcuts

antiPatterns.title: Form Validation on Submit Only
antiPatterns.problem: Users only see errors after attempting to submit
solutions: Validate on blur for real-time feedback
Show error summary at top AND inline with fields
Use inline validation with clear, actionable messages
Disable submit until form is valid (or allow submit with warnings)

antiPatterns.title: Modal Overload
antiPatterns.problem: Too many modals, or modals for complex tasks
antiPatterns.impact: Lost context, trapped users, broken workflows
solutions: Use modals for quick tasks only (1-3 fields)
For complex forms, use full pages or drawers
Avoid modal chains (modal opening modal)
Provide clear cancel/escape routes

antiPatterns.title: Ignoring Empty States
antiPatterns.problem: No feedback when lists/tables have no data
solutions: Show helpful empty states with explanation
Provide action to add first item
Distinguish between 'no data' and 'loading' states
Use illustrations sparingly and purposefully

antiPatterns.title: Inconsistent Error Messages
antiPatterns.problem: Different error formats across the application
solutions: Create standardized error message templates
Use icons + text + color consistently
Include actionable guidance ('Try again', 'Contact support')
Log errors for debugging while showing user-friendly message

antiPatterns.title: Dashboard Clutter
antiPatterns.problem: Too many metrics, charts, and widgets competing for attention
solutions: Prioritize - only 3-5 key metrics on primary dashboard
Allow dashboard customization for user roles
Group related metrics together
Use progressive disclosure for detailed data

antiPatterns.title: Infinite Scroll Without Pagination
antiPatterns.problem: Scrolling forever with no way to jump to specific items
antiPatterns.impact: Hard to find items, performance issues, no 'load more' option
solutions: Use pagination for data tables (even if infinite scroll elsewhere)
Provide search/filter for large datasets
Show total count when available
Consider virtual scrolling for very large lists

antiPatterns.title: Lost in Space (No Breadcrumbs)
antiPatterns.problem: Users can't navigate back or understand their location
solutions: Always show breadcrumbs in hierarchical applications
Make breadcrumb items clickable
Include current location in page title
Provide 'home' or dashboard link
